visual_description: A man in a red and blue polo shirt sits on an orange couch, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, facing another man in a blue shirt seated to his right. Behind them, other people are partially visible, some standing and others seated, in what appears to be a casual indoor setting with furniture and decor. The man in red maintains an upright posture, his gaze directed toward the man in blue, while the man in blue turns his head slightly toward him.
